criteria.label: Create derived ratio and domain flag columns in pandas.
criteria.example: Given price and sqft columns, add price_per_sqft with safe division and is_luxury flag where price > 1_000_000; print the resulting DataFrame.

criteria.label: Add a justified interaction column for a stated business scenario.
criteria.example: For retail data with promo_depth and is_weekend, create promo_x_weekend and explain in one sentence why a linear model needs it.

criteria.label: Extract datetime parts and cyclical hour encoding from timestamps.
criteria.example: Parse event_time, add dayofweek, is_weekend, and hour_sin/hour_cos using the 24-hour period; show one row before and after.

criteria.label: Build customer-level aggregates via groupby and merge without leakage description.
criteria.example: From orders and customers tables, compute order_count and total_spend per customer_id, merge to customers, and state the cutoff rule that prevents future-order leakage.

criteria.label: Contrast feature creation with feature extraction for a mixed tabular+text dataset.
criteria.example: List two columns you would create by formula (tenure_days, price_per_unit) and one field you would extract with TfidfVectorizer instead, with one-line justification each.
